assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types: end-of-support warnings, security patches, scheduled auto-upgrades, and available version updates

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns urgency levels with URGENT for security patches and EoS, MEDIUM for scheduled upgrades and minor versions, INFORMATIONAL for patch versions and general announcements

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings require action within 30-60 days and provides specific commands for upgrading or migrating to Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response specifies actions for scheduled upgrades including 'Verify maintenance window timing', 'Ensure team is prepared', and provides team responsibilities with pre-upgrade testing requirements

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response categorizes critical security patches as URGENT requiring action within 7-14 days, which implies expedited handling outside normal maintenance

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes available version updates as either MEDIUM (minor versions for planning) or INFORMATIONAL (patch versions), explicitly stating 'No immediate action needed' for informational items

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response provides specific Pub/Sub configuration commands and Cloud Logging queries for monitoring GKE upgrade events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes - it focuses on notification handling but lacks this reference
